seo.description: Second page in the demo bundle — cross-page navigation and relative asset URLs from nested depth.

props.title: About this demo
paragraphs: This page is served at about/index.html. Header links from here use relative paths (../ for home, ./ for this page).
The home page showcases all v1 widgets including project_grid, apps_showcase, layout containers, and media_swiper.

items.title: Home route
items.text: Empty slug maps to index.html at the site root.

items.title: About route
items.text: Slug about maps to about/index.html with ../-prefixed assets.
